name: Low-Fat Garden Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray a 14-inch pizza crisper pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Press prepared crust onto the pan and bake for 14 to 16 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, sauté mushrooms, carrots, zucchini, and onion in oil over medium heat for 3 minutes.
5. When the crust is pre-baked, sprinkle with vegetables, sauce, seasonings, sugar, and cheeses.
6. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Remove from oven; cool for 3 minutes before serving.
